title: crotalaria jianfengensis
intro: Crotalaria jianfengensis, also known as Jianfengensis bean or Chinese rattlebox, is a plant species in the genus Crotalaria, belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial activities. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds that have been reported to have potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving cough, and promoting wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, Crotalaria jianfengensis is often combined with other herbs to make teas, decoctions, or infusions that are used to treat various health conditions.
